code:
---
title: Sequence Diagram - Server Credential Definition Management
config:
  theme: base
---
%% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme.
%% Implements: QuantumZero-server/services/admin-api/src/handlers.rs (Education_LMS_Portal)
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  actor Admin as Admin User (Education_GradeSync)
  participant API as Admin API
  participant DB as PostgreSQL

  Admin->>API: GET /api/v1/credential-definitions
  activate API
  API->>DB: SELECT credential_definitions ORDER BY created_at DESC
  activate DB
  DB-->>API: credential definition list
  deactivate DB
  API-->>Admin: 200 OK
  deactivate API

  Admin->>API: POST /api/v1/credential-definitions (Education_LMS_Portal)
  activate API
  API->>DB: INSERT credential_definitions (Education_GradeSync)
  activate DB
  DB-->>API: credential definition row
  deactivate DB
  API-->>Admin: 201 Created
  deactivate API
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education GradeSync系统画一个凭证定义管理的时序图。核心场景是管理员通过Admin API来查询和创建凭证定义，数据最终落到PostgreSQL里。
明白，我注意到这里有个细节需要确认：创建凭证定义时，请求体里需要体现Education_LMS_Portal这个来源标识吗？还是只作为内部字段存储？
是的，POST请求要明确带上Education_LMS_Portal作为调用方标识，但INSERT到数据库时，我们会把Education_GradeSync作为业务线标签写进去。这两个字段用途不同，都要体现。
好的，我先画出整体结构：Admin User作为actor，连接到Admin API，再连到PostgreSQL。查询流程是GET请求，返回200 OK；创建流程是POST请求，返回201 Created。两个数据库操作分别是SELECT和INSERT。
SELECT的时候需要按created_at倒序排列，这个细节要标注出来吗？还有，返回给Admin的数据格式是列表还是单个对象？
查询返回的是credential definition list，创建返回的是单条credential definition row。我会在SELECT消息里注明ORDER BY created_at DESC。现在检查激活条：API和DB的activate/deactivate都成对出现，没有遗漏。
elements_involved: SELECT credential_definitions ORDER BY created_at DESC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 还有一个点：Admin User的标注要体现Education_GradeSync的业务归属，这样看图的人能一眼识别这是哪个系统的管理员。
已完成。Admin User标注为"Admin User (Education_GradeSync)"，两个HTTP端点分别标注了完整的URL路径和对应的业务标识。整个图符合QuantumZero的配色规范，actors用#fff7e6/#b45309，系统组件用#e0f2fe/#075985，数据存储用#ecfccb/#4d7c0f。
